name: Location
description: The definition of an addressable space/position both in real and virtual environments with associated uses and entitlements

attributeList.name: LocationDescription
attributeList.description: A description of the property, particularly if it has landmark characteristics.

attributeList.name: LocationDateTime
attributeList.description: Key dates associated with the directory entry (e.g. open date, refresh date).

attributeList.name: LocationStatus
attributeList.description: The tracked status (e.g. under construction or repair, inhabited, vacant).

attributeList.name: LocationType
attributeList.description: Type of location (e.g. building, point of interest, virtual location/device).

attributeList.name: LocationZoningType
attributeList.description: The planning or zoning status (e.g. residential, commercial, industrial).

attributeList.name: LocationNeighborhoodType
attributeList.description: The general purpose and neighborhood of the property  (e.g. residential, industrial, commercial).

attributeList.name: LocationConstructionType
attributeList.description: The construction approach for a property at the location (e.g. era and architecture as might be used in valuation).

attributeList.name: LocationOccupancyType
attributeList.description: The type of occupancy (e.g. residency, business, retail, entertainment).

attributeList.name: LocationValue
attributeList.description: The estimated (book) value of the property at the location - rental and purchase as appropriate.

attributeList.name: LocationCapacity
attributeList.description: An indication of the size or scale of the property where appropriate (e.g. 4 bedroom, 600 seat auditorium, 40 cover restaurant).
